title: Nonobvious
html:
Nonobvious

A one-word filter Yahir applies to product ideas — is this nonobvious? — that surfaces three times in a single 2022 note and then becomes the implicit selector behind every later product decision, including Rankett's wedge into the still-unnamed ai search optimization category. Nonobvious is the executable form of asking the right question: if the answer is the first thing everyone reaches for, it's the wrong answer.

The triple-articulation lives in 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream — Yahir's densest note in the corpus, written weeks after ChatGPT's public launch:

  • "What is non-obvious"
  • "Seek nonobvious things"
  • "-obvious?? Customer service app" (in the ChatGPT wedge brainstorm — flagging customer-service-bot as the obvious-and-therefore-uninteresting wrapper play that everyone else would build)

The same note carries the "Take existing things if equivalent value, but make them with 1/10 less resources and significantly cheaper" line — nonobvious as the founder's value-investing analog, the build-side restatement of "go where they ain't" from the 17-year-old 2020 04 23 go to diamond Munger-quoting watchlist. The whole value investing / circle of competence / nonobvious / asking the right question family is one philosophy with four names — find the question whose answer isn't already priced in.

By 2026 01 13 rankett com the filter is operational. The note opens with Yahir asking himself, almost in real time, whether the ai search optimization / AI visibility space he's been building in for months is nonobvious enough — "Are there people out there rn that are truly pursuing this with all of their intention and soul?" — and a self-prompt to deep-think about whether his own moat exists. The same note then operationalizes the filter at product level: instead of building yet another SEO dashboard ("obvious"), Rankett is positioned as a whitelabel ai visibility engine sold only to agencies with 5+ existing clients (2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep guide). Three layers of nonobvious in one positioning: not direct-to-end-client, not a SaaS tool, not for solo agencies. Each filter eliminates the obvious move.

The deepest expression of nonobvious is structural — it's the reason Rankett stays self-funded with no runway discipline rather than raising. The obvious play for a solo founder with a hot AI category is "raise a seed". Yahir is doing the opposite, which is itself the nonobvious move and the moat. The filter applied to the company itself.

Source summaries

  • 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream
  • 2026 01 13 rankett com
  • first batch 2026 04 26

Connections
